---
title: "Recruitment_Report"
---
# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for Recruitment data

``` {r Model Selection}

Recruitment <- Recruitment %>%
  mutate(Month = month(RetDate),
         Year = year(RetDate)) %>%
  filter(Year <= ReportYear)


# Analysis indicates No difference in distributions between years, suggests using a single model

# Figure out which data distribution to use
# All years
hist(Recruitment$NumBottom)
# past years
hist(subset(Recruitment, RetDate <= ReportStart)$NumBottom)
# current year
hist(subset(Recruitment, RetDate >= ReportStart)$NumBottom) 

# Treating Month and year as factor and not as numerical greatly improved fit.
# Attempts to add in extra nested random effects like Section and ShellID either worsened fit or resulted in non-convergence
# Zero-inflation (~1) did not improve fit
# testdispersion indicates no evidence of excess or under dispersion

RecruitmentRate <- glmmTMB(
  NumBottom ~ factor(SectionName) * factor(Month) + factor(Year) +
    (1 | FixedLocationID) +
    offset(log(NumDays)),
  family = nbinom2,
  data = Recruitment)

simulateResiduals(RecruitmentRate, n = 1000, plot = T)

acf(residuals(RecruitmentRate, type = "pearson"))

summary(RecruitmentRate)

# No summary table of raw means in appendix
#“Due to variable deployment duration (21–35 days), raw counts were standardized using a 28-day offset model. Raw means and standard deviations are not presented because they do not correspond directly to the standardized modeled rate estimates.”

# Diagnostic Table for the Appendix
diag_RecruitmentRate <- extract_diagnostics(RecruitmentRate,  "Recruitment Rate")

```


``` {r Data extraction}
# Predict standardized monthly settlement rates
# Rate units are spat per shell per day
#Use 28 days because that gives values comparable to your historic method:

#1. Predicted Means + 95% CI for All Years (Section × Month)
# Make sure Month, Year, SectionName are factors
emm_ALL <- emmeans(
  RecruitmentRate,
  specs = ~ Year * SectionName * Month,
  at = list(
    NumDays = 28
  ),
  type = "response"
)
emm_ALL <- as.data.frame(emm_ALL)
emm_ALL$asymp.UCL[is.infinite(emm_ALL$asymp.UCL)] <- 0 # replace any overruns to 0

##########
#2. Predicted Means + 95% CI for all previous years combined (2015–2023 pooled)
emm_prev <- emm_ALL %>%
  filter(Year < ReportYear)

df_prev_mean <- emm_prev %>%
  group_by(SectionName, Month) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_resp = mean(response),
    lcl = mean(asymp.LCL),
    ucl = mean(asymp.UCL),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Current Year Predicted Means + 95% CI for current year
currentyear <- emm_ALL %>%
  filter(Year == ReportYear)

############# Raw means and SD (28-day standardized)
RecRaw_Historic <- Recruitment %>%
  filter(Year < ReportYear) %>%
  mutate(RecRateRaw = NumBottom / (NumDays / 28)) %>%
  group_by(SectionName,
           Month) %>%
  summarise(RecRateMeanRAW = mean(RecRateRaw, na.rm = TRUE),
            RecRateSDRAW = sd(RecRateRaw, na.rm = TRUE))

RecRaw_Current <- Recruitment %>%
  filter(Year == ReportYear) %>%
  mutate(RecRateRaw = NumBottom / (NumDays / 28)) %>%
  group_by(SectionName,
           Month) %>%
  summarise(RecRateMeanRAW = mean(RecRateRaw, na.rm = TRUE),
            RecRateSDRAW = sd(RecRateRaw, na.rm = TRUE))

# Summary Table for Appendix
RecruitmentRateHistoric_TABLE <- left_join(RecRaw_Historic, df_prev_mean, by = c("SectionName", "Month")) %>%
  rename(RecruitmentMean_modeled = mean_resp,
         RecruitmentLower_modeled = lcl,
         RecruitmentUpper_modeled = ucl,
         RecruitmentMean_raw = RecRateMeanRAW,
         RecruitmentSD_raw = RecRateSDRAW) %>%
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3)) %>%
  arrange(SectionName)


RecruitmentRateCurrent_TABLE <- left_join(RecRaw_Current, currentyear, by = c("SectionName", "Month")) %>%
  rename(RecruitmentMean_modeled = response,
         RecruitmentLower_modeled = asymp.LCL,
         RecruitmentUpper_modeled = asymp.UCL,
         RecruitmentMean_raw = RecRateMeanRAW,
         RecruitmentSD_raw = RecRateSDRAW) %>%
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3)) %>%
  arrange(SectionName) %>%
  select(-Year, -SE, -df)

```



``` {r ChatFigures}
# Set data frames
hist_monthly <- df_prev_mean %>%
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))
# Section | Month | mean | lcl | ucl

hist_yearly <- emm_prev %>%
  mutate(SectionName = factor(SectionName, levels = lv3))
# Section | Year | Month | mean

# Historical
# ggplot Skeleton
HistoricalRecruitment_FIGURE <-
ggplot() +
  # 1. Historical CI ribbon
  geom_ribbon(
    data = hist_monthly,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      ymin = lcl,
      ymax = ucl,
      group = SectionName
    ),
    alpha = 0.25
  ) +

  # 2. Individual years (thin lines)
  geom_line(
    data = hist_yearly,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      y = response,
      group = Year
    ),
    linewidth = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +

  # 3. Historical mean line
  geom_line(
    data = hist_monthly,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      y = mean_resp
    ),
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  facet_grid(rows = vars(SectionName)) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12, labels = month.abb) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Modeled recruitment rate",
    title = "Historical Monthly Oyster Recruitment (2015–2023)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() 

print(HistoricalRecruitment_FIGURE)

########################
# Current Year

CurrentRecruitment_FIGURE <- ggplot() +

  # 1. Historical CI ribbon
  geom_ribbon(
    data = hist_monthly,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      ymin = lcl,
      ymax = ucl,
      group = SectionName
    ),
    alpha = 0.25
  ) +

  # 2. Historical monthly mean line
  geom_line(
    data = hist_monthly,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      y = mean_resp
    ),
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +

  # 3. Current year's mean as a symbol
    geom_point(
    data = currentyear,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      y = response
    ),
    shape = 2,        # triangle point up
    size = 3,
    stroke = 1
  ) +

  # 4. Current year's 95% CI
  geom_errorbar(
    data = currentyear,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      ymin = asymp.LCL,
      ymax = asymp.UCL
    ),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +

  facet_grid(rows = vars(SectionName)) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Modeled recruitment rate",
    title = "Monthly Oyster Recruitment in 2024 Relative to Historical Conditions"
  ) +

  theme_bw() 
  # theme(
  #   panel.spacing.y = unit(1.1, "lines"),
  #   strip.background = element_blank(),
  #   strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  # )


print(CurrentRecruitment_FIGURE)


```





















``` {Recruitment Text}
### Placeholder for Recruitment text for report
```
This is text to output for Recruitment
